CustomField.description: The field on the account plan that holds the date value that is used for time decay of the score this metadata record represents
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this field is not set or if 'Use Time Decay' is not checked then time decay will not be used for the scoring of this object. Time decay will also not work if the field entered is invalid or not a date or date time field on the Account Plan object.
CustomField.label: Date Field API Name
